columns.extraction_plan: The value is reported in the text on page 4, under the "3.2. Biochemical and radiographic progression-free survival" section, and also in Table 2 on page 4. Page 4, Text: "The bPFS was significantly longer for patients randomized in the ADT plus D arm in the overall population at 22.9 mo (95% CI, 19.5–28.4)". Page 4, Table 2: In the "GETUG-AFU 15" section, under "All patients", locate the row "bPFS, mo". The value for "ADT plus D, mo" is 22.9. Value: 22.9

The value is reported in the text on page 4, under the "3.2. Biochemical and radiographic progression-free survival" section, and also in Table 2 on page 4. Page 4, Text: "...versus 12.9 mo (95% CI, 11.9–17.7) (HR: 0.67 [95% CI, 0.54–0.84]; p < 0.001) (Fig. 4)". Page 4, Table 2: In the "GETUG-AFU 15" section, under "All patients", locate the row "bPFS, mo". The value for "ADT, mo" is 12.9. Value: 12.9
